task:
Fix user-invocable: false in two skills. Use the Edit tool.

Both skills/naming/SKILL.md and skills/performance/SKILL.md have "user-invocable: false" in their frontmatter, but both have explicit user-facing trigger phrases in their descriptions (e.g., "Use when the user asks to..."). The flag is inconsistent with the intent.

Remove "user-invocable: false" from both files. The line to remove from each is:
  user-invocable: false

This makes them consistent with all other skills that have user-facing trigger phrases and are invocable as slash commands.
